name: Bemdaneprocel Parkinson disease phase 1 trial
summary: An open-label dose-escalation phase 1 trial grafting hES cell-derived dopaminergic neuron progenitors bilaterally into the putamen in Parkinson disease.
population: People with Parkinson disease receiving bilateral putamen grafts with one year of immunosuppression

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation because they can show whether the intervention changes safety, biomarkers, and function in People with Parkinson disease receiving bilateral putamen grafts with one year of immunosuppression. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
